da.hero_title: Din rejse mod at blive yogalærer
da.hero_subtitle: 200-timers yogauddannelse i København — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Hot Yoga plus meditation
da.learn1_desc: Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin og Hot Yoga — med teknik, justeringer og variationer for hvert stilart.
da.learn2_desc: Knogler, led, muskler og nervesystem. Praktisk anvendt anatomi, du kan bruge i undervisningen.
da.learn3_desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita, de 8 lemmer og yogaens udvikling fra oldtid til nu.
da.learn4_desc: Cueing, stemme, rummet, energi og hvordan du skaber en tryg og inspirerende klasse.
da.learn5_desc: Sekvensering, kreativ klasseopbygning og hvordan du finder din unikke undervisningsstil.
da.learn6_desc: Karriereveje, studieåbning, retreat-planlægning og hvordan du bygger en bæredygtig praksis.
da.hours_subtitle: Uddannelsen dækker alle aspekter af yoga og undervisning, fordelt over 200 timer.
da.formats_subtitle: Samme curriculum, samme certificering — tilpasset din hverdag.
da.format18_desc: Undervisning 2-3 gange om ugen. Perfekt til dig med job eller studie. Hverdage eller weekends.
da.format8_desc: 3-4 dage om ugen. Balanceret tempo med tid til fordybelse. Start maj/juni 2026.
da.format4_desc: Fuld immersion — daglig træning og teori. Mulighed for overnatning. Start i 2026.
da.cert_subtitle: Yoga Bible er en registreret Yoga Alliance skole (RYS-200). Din certificering er internationalt anerkendt og giver dig RYT-200 status, som åbner døre til undervisning verden over.
da.cert_ryt3: Alle tidligere Triangle Yoga Academy certificeringer forbliver fuldt gyldige.
da.cta_title: Klar til at starte din rejse?
da.cta_text: Få skemaet og ansøg i dag. Næste hold starter snart.

en.hero_title: Your journey to becoming a yoga teacher
en.hero_subtitle: 200-hour yoga education in Copenhagen — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin & Hot Yoga plus meditation
en.learn1_desc: Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin & Hot Yoga — with technique, adjustments and variations for each style.
en.learn2_desc: Bones, joints, muscles and the nervous system. Practical applied anatomy you can use in your teaching.
en.learn3_desc: Yoga Sutras, Bhagavad Gita, the 8 limbs and the evolution of yoga from ancient to modern times.
en.learn4_desc: Cueing, voice, space, energy and how to create a safe and inspiring class environment.
en.learn5_desc: Sequencing, creative class design and how to find your unique teaching style.
en.learn6_desc: Career paths, studio openings, retreat planning and how to build a sustainable practice.
en.hours_subtitle: The education covers all aspects of yoga and teaching, spread across 200 hours.
en.formats_subtitle: Same curriculum, same certification — adapted to your everyday life.
en.format18_desc: Classes 2-3 times per week. Perfect alongside your job or studies. Weekdays or weekends.
en.format8_desc: 3-4 days per week. Balanced pace with time for integration. Starting May/June 2026.
en.format4_desc: Full immersion — daily training and theory. Accommodation options available. Starting 2026.
en.cert_subtitle: Yoga Bible is a registered Yoga Alliance school (RYS-200). Your certification is internationally recognized and grants you RYT-200 status, opening doors to teaching worldwide.
en.cert_ryt3: All previous Triangle Yoga Academy certifications remain fully valid.
en.cta_text: Get the schedule and apply today. Next cohort starts soon.
